content.content:
log "Preparing remote directories"
run_cmd 'for SERVER in "${SERVERS[@]}"; do ssh "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER}" "set -e; mkdir -p '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}'\'' '\''${REMOTE_SHARED_DIR}'\''"; done'

log "Uploading artifact to all servers in parallel"
run_cmd 'pids=(); for SERVER in "${SERVERS[@]}"; do rsync -az --delete "${LOCAL_ARTIFACT_PATH}" "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER}:${REMOTE_ARTIFACT_PATH}" & pids+=("$!"); done; for pid in "${pids[@]}"; do wait "$pid"; done'

log "Deploying on remote servers"
run_cmd 'for SERVER in "${SERVERS[@]}"; do ssh "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER}" "set -euo pipefail; RELEASE_NAME=\$(basename '\''${ARTIFACT_NAME}'\'' .tar.gz); RELEASE_DIR='\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/'\''\${RELEASE_NAME}; mkdir -p \"$RELEASE_DIR\"; tar -xzf '\''${REMOTE_ARTIFACT_PATH}'\'' -C \"$RELEASE_DIR\"; rm -f '\''${REMOTE_ARTIFACT_PATH}'\''; cd \"$RELEASE_DIR\"; npm ci --omit=dev; cat > .env <<'"'"'EOF'"'"'; NODE_ENV=production; PORT=3000; LOG_LEVEL=info; EOF; if [ -f '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/current_release'\'' ]; then cp '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/current_release'\'' '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/previous_release'\''; fi; echo \"$RELEASE_NAME\" > '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/current_release'\''; if [ -f migrations.sh ]; then chmod +x migrations.sh; ./migrations.sh; elif npm run | grep -q '\''migrate'\''; then npm run migrate; fi; ln -sfn \"$RELEASE_DIR\" '\''${REMOTE_CURRENT_LINK}'\''; pm2 restart '\''${PM2_APP_NAME}'\'' --update-env || pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --only '\''${PM2_APP_NAME}'\'' --update-env; pm2 save"; done'
